steps.t: Elgar Crowfoot is holed up in Ost Lagorath to the north-east. You should find the stolen potatoes there.
If you defeat Elgar Crowfoot, the rest of the ruffians won't return to threaten Gamwich. You should steal back the stolen potatoes to lure him out.
You have defeated Elgar Crowfoot and reclaimed the stolen potatoes. You should return to Adro outside of Gamwich.
